  "text": "func (b *backend) pathLoginUpdate(ctx context.Context, req *logical.Request, data *framework.FieldData) (*logical.Response, error) {
n1: 	anyEc2, allEc2 := hasValuesForEc2Auth(data)
n2: 	anyIam, allIam := hasValuesForIamAuth(data)
n3: 	switch {
n4: 	case anyEc2 && anyIam:
n5: 		return logical.ErrorResponse("supplied auth values for both ec2 and iam auth types"), nil
n6: 	case anyEc2 && !allEc2:
n7: 		return logical.ErrorResponse("supplied some of the auth values for the ec2 auth type but not all"), nil
n8: 	case anyEc2:
n9: 		return b.pathLoginUpdateEc2(ctx, req, data)
n10: 	case anyIam && !allIam:
n11: 		return logical.ErrorResponse("supplied some of the auth values for the iam auth type but not all"), nil
n12: 	case anyIam:
n13: 		return b.pathLoginUpdateIam(ctx, req, data)
n14: 	default:
n15: 		return logical.ErrorResponse("didn't supply required authentication values"), nil
	}
}
